name: Qwen3.7-Plus
archDisplay: MoE, exact expert configuration undisclosed; multimodal agent variant built on the Qwen3.7-Max backbone
note: Cheaper, multimodal (vision + video input) sibling of Qwen3.7-Max released ~2 weeks later on the Bailian/Model Studio platform; adds GUI grounding and screen/mobile agent capability (ScreenSpot Pro, AndroidWorld) on top of the Max agent backbone. Text output only (no image/video generation). Preceded by a preview from ~May 14, 2026.

results.notes: Terminal Bench 2.0-Terminus, outperforming DeepSeek-V4-Pro Max (67.9) and Gemini-3.1 Pro (63.5) per vendor comparison
SWE-Bench Verified, vendor-stated (Qwen's own launch benchmark table, run with thinking disabled). Qwen3.7-Plus trails Claude Opus 4.6 Max (80.8) and DeepSeek V4-Pro Max (80.6) on this metric.
OSWorld-Verified (desktop-GUI computer-use), vendor-stated on Qwen's own harness with thinking disabled; trails GPT-5.4 (75.0) on this metric per the same launch table.
Humanity's Last Exam, official Qwen launch blog, 'STEM & Reasoning' table (Qwen3.7-Plus column).
Official Qwen launch blog, 'STEM & Reasoning' table.
Official Qwen launch blog, 'General Capability' table.

Official Qwen launch blog, 'General Capability' table; recorded under this corpus's dedicated 'mmlu-redux' slug (not conflated with base MMLU, which was not separately reported for this model in this table).
SuperGPQA, official Qwen launch blog, 'General Capability' table.
Official Qwen launch blog, 'General Capability' table.
Official Qwen launch blog, 'General Capability' table; reported as a separate row from IFEval.

Official Qwen launch blog, 'Multimodal Benchmarks / Multimodal Reasoning' table.

Reported as 'CharXiv(RQ)' (reasoning-question subset) = '85.9 / 84.4' (the table's footnote states these are 'with CI / without CI' but does not define CI); 85.9 (the first-listed value) used as the primary figure here, consistent with how other Qwen-family models in this corpus record the CharXiv RQ subset under this slug.

Reported as 'VideoMME (w/ sub.)' in the official table's Video Understanding section, consistent with how several other Qwen-family models in this corpus record VideoMME-with-subtitles under this slug.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real via multiple independent sources (MarkTechPost, VentureBeat headline citing the exact $0.4/$1.6 pricing, digitalapplied, buildfastwithai) and the official Alibaba Cloud Model Studio pricing page, which lists 'Qwen3.7-Plus' with the identical $0.40/$1.60 (0-256K tier) and a second $1.20/$4.80 tier for 256K-1M tokens -- confirming both the model's existence and its exact base pricing. GA date has minor variance (June 1-3, 2026 across sources); used June 2, 2026 (MarkTechPost publish date, closest to consensus). Pricing figure used is the base (0-256K) tier; a higher tier applies above 256K input tokens per the official pricing page. Architecture undisclosed across all sources, consistent with Qwen3.7-Max. Benchmark scores (GPQA Diamond 90.3, SWE-bench Pro ~57.6) directly confirmed via digitalapplied fetch; Terminal-Bench 70.3 corroborated by both the original VentureBeat-summarized search result and a direct buildfastwithai fetch. GUI/mobile-agent scores (ScreenSpot Pro 79.0, AndroidWorld 81.0, MRCR-v2 91.7) have no matching benchmark slug in the valid list and were omitted rather than misfiled under an existing slug.
